column1: This snake is________________harmless, but it protects__________from______________by pretending to be dangerous. (COMPLETE/IT/ENEMY)
Boys, you'll enjoy__________if you travel by train. (YOU)
Come and meet Julia. She's a good friend of__________ . (I)
The ground was covered with yellow and red______________ . (LEAF)
______________of beautiful animals live on coral reefs. (THOUSAND)
